Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis
 
org.springframework.ai.model.chat.memory.redis.autoconfigure
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis used by org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis
    Class
    Description
    AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
    Redis-specific extended interface for ChatMemoryRepository with advanced query capabilities.
    AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation
    A wrapper class to return messages with their conversation context.
    RedisChatMemoryConfig
    Configuration class for RedisChatMemoryRepository.
    RedisChatMemoryConfig.Builder
    Builder for RedisChatMemoryConfig.
    RedisChatMemoryRepository
    Redis implementation of ChatMemoryRepository using Redis (JSON + Query Engine).
    RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder
    Inner static builder class for constructing instances of RedisChatMemoryRepository.
